Implementation: SOC labels, SOC_CC, cumulative Ah, window-start SOC, and trajectory progress are excluded from all input schemas.
Evaluation relevance: No direct SOC proxy or explicit SOC-state input.

Implementation: Current is used as instantaneous current, local excitation, and causal EMA/deviation features only.
EMA features use one-sided forward recurrences within each record.
EMA states are reset at each profile-temperature record boundary.
Standardization is fitted on training records only.
